description_long: This doll features a slender, elongated body with black limbs and torso, accented by white stripes on the forearms and lower legs. The head is round and pale with prominent red cheeks, black eye sockets, and a wide, painted smile, giving it a theatrical, mask-like appearance. Three white buttons are vertically aligned on the chest, adding to its puppet-like aesthetic. The fingers are long and splayed, with exaggerated, pointed tips. The overall design is reminiscent of a marionette or mime, with a monochrome palette punctuated by bold facial markings. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a plastic or vinyl construction.
description: A slender, black-and-white striped doll with a mask-like face, red cheeks, and long, pointed fingers. Its theatrical appearance is accentuated by white buttons and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's mask-like face, red cheeks, three white chest buttons, and fully extended arms with striped forearms and legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the doll's thin profile, rounded head, and the curvature of the limbs, with facial features partially visible.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the solid black back of the head and torso, with white stripes on the arms and legs, and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the slim profile, arm extension, and partial facial features.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is styled in a black bodysuit with white horizontal stripes on the forearms and lower legs, and three white buttons on the chest, evoking a mime or marionette costume. The design is minimalist and theatrical, with no additional garments or fabric textures.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms fully extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical, resembling a classic T-pose.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a fixed, wide smile with upturned corners, large black eye sockets, and red circular cheeks, giving it a perpetually cheerful and theatrical expression.
attribute_hair_style: The doll has no visible hair; the head is smooth and painted in a pale color.
